ddls:
CREATE TABLE "sensor_readings" (
  "reading_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each reading */,
  "device_id" INTEGER /* ID of the device the reading is from */,
  "sensor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sensor the reading is from */,
  "sensor_type" TEXT /* Type of sensor (e.g., accelerometer, gyroscope, magnetometer) */,
  "x_value" REAL /* X-axis value of the reading */,
  "y_value" REAL /* Y-axis value of the reading */,
  "z_value" REAL /* Z-axis value of the reading */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the reading */,
  "location" TEXT /* Geographical location where the reading was taken (latitude, longitude) */,
  "accuracy" REAL /* Accuracy of the reading */,
  "battery_level" REAL /* Battery level of the device at the time of the reading */,
  "firmware_version" TEXT /* Firmware version of the sensor at the time of the reading */,
  "weather_conditions" TEXT /* Weather conditions at the time of the reading */,
  "environmental_data" TEXT /* Additional environmental data (e.g., temperature, humidity) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("reading_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sensor_readings_sensor_id FOREIGN KEY ("sensor_id") REFERENCES sensors ("sensor_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sensor_readings_device_id FOREIGN KEY ("device_id") REFERENCES devices ("device_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "devices" (
  "device_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each device */,
  "device_name" TEXT /* Name of the device */,
  "device_type" TEXT /* Type of device (e.g., smartphone, smartwatch, industrial sensor) */,
  "device_description" TEXT /* Description of the device */,
  "location" TEXT /* Default location of the device */,
  "battery_capacity" REAL /* Battery capacity of the device */,
  "firmware_version" TEXT /* Current firmware version of the device */,
  "last_seen" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last reading from the device */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the device (e.g., active, inactive, maintenance) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("device_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sensors" (
  "sensor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sensor */,
  "device_id" INTEGER /* ID of the device the sensor is attached to */,
  "sensor_type" TEXT /* Type of sensor (e.g., accelerometer, gyroscope, magnetometer) */,
  "sensor_description" TEXT /* Description of the sensor */,
  "manufacturer" TEXT /* Manufacturer of the sensor */,
  "model" TEXT /* Model of the sensor */,
  "installation_date" TEXT /* Date the sensor was installed */,
  "calibration_frequency" TEXT /* How often the sensor needs to be calibrated */,
  "last_calibration_date" TEXT /* Date of the last calibration */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sensor_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sensors_device_id FOREIGN KEY ("device_id") REFERENCES devices ("device_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, user) */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the user's last login */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the user account */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the user account (e.g., active, suspended, deleted) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "devices_users" (
  "device_id" INTEGER /* ID of the device */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "access_level" TEXT /* Access level of the user for the device (e.g., read, write, admin) */,
  "assigned_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user was assigned to the device */,
  "unassigned_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user was unassigned from the device */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("device_id", "user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sensor_calibrations" (
  "calibration_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each calibration */,
  "sensor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sensor being calibrated */,
  "calibration_date" TEXT /* Date of the calibration */,
  "x_offset" REAL /* X-axis offset value */,
  "y_offset" REAL /* Y-axis offset value */,
  "z_offset" REAL /* Z-axis offset value */,
  "calibrated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who performed the calibration */,
  "calibration_notes" TEXT /* Notes or comments about the calibration */,
  "calibration_status" TEXT /* Status of the calibration (e.g., pending, completed, failed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("calibration_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sensor_calibrations_calibrated_by FOREIGN KEY ("calibrated_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sensor_calibrations_sensor_id FOREIGN KEY ("sensor_id") REFERENCES sensors ("sensor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "pitch_values" (
  "pitch_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each pitch value */,
  "device_id" INTEGER /* ID of the device */,
  "sensor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sensor */,
  "pitch_value" REAL /* Pitch value of the device */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the pitch value */,
  "accuracy" REAL /* Accuracy of the pitch value */,
  "environmental_data" TEXT /* Additional environmental data (e.g., temperature, humidity) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("pitch_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_pitch_values_device_id FOREIGN KEY ("device_id") REFERENCES devices ("device_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_pitch_values_sensor_id FOREIGN KEY ("sensor_id") REFERENCES sensors ("sensor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roll_values" (
  "roll_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each roll value */,
  "device_id" INTEGER /* ID of the device */,
  "sensor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sensor */,
  "roll_value" REAL /* Roll value of the device */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the roll value */,
  "accuracy" REAL /* Accuracy of the roll value */,
  "environmental_data" TEXT /* Additional environmental data (e.g., temperature, humidity) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("roll_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_roll_values_device_id FOREIGN KEY ("device_id") REFERENCES devices ("device_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_roll_values_sensor_id FOREIGN KEY ("sensor_id") REFERENCES sensors ("sensor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "heading_values" (
  "heading_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each heading value */,
  "device_id" INTEGER /* ID of the device */,
  "sensor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sensor */,
  "heading_value" REAL /* Heading value of the device */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the heading value */,
  "accuracy" REAL /* Accuracy of the heading value */,
  "environmental_data" TEXT /* Additional environmental data (e.g., temperature, humidity) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("heading_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_heading_values_sensor_id FOREIGN KEY ("sensor_id") REFERENCES sensors ("sensor_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_heading_values_device_id FOREIGN KEY ("device_id") REFERENCES devices ("device_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "magnetometer_values" (
  "magnetometer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each magnetometer value */,
  "device_id" INTEGER /* ID of the device */,
  "sensor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sensor */,
  "x_value" REAL /* X-axis value of the magnetometer */,
  "y_value" REAL /* Y-axis value of the magnetometer */,
  "z_value" REAL /* Z-axis value of the magnetometer */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the magnetometer value */,
  "accuracy" REAL /* Accuracy of the magnetometer value */,
  "environmental_data" TEXT /* Additional environmental data (e.g., temperature, humidity) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("magnetometer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_magnetometer_values_sensor_id FOREIGN KEY ("sensor_id") REFERENCES sensors ("sensor_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_magnetometer_values_device_id FOREIGN KEY ("device_id") REFERENCES devices ("device_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "export_import_history" (
  "history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each export-import history */,
  "device_id" INTEGER /* ID of the device */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who performed the export/import */,
  "export_import_date" TEXT /* Date of the export-import */,
  "export_import_type" TEXT /* Type of the export-import (e.g., export, import) */,
  "file_name" TEXT /* Name of the file that was exported/imported */,
  "file_size" TEXT /* Size of the file that was exported/imported */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the export/import (e.g., success, failure) */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Notes or comments about the export/import */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_export_import_history_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_export_import_history_device_id FOREIGN KEY ("device_id") REFERENCES devices ("device_id")
)
